name: Mosquito
description: A Tier 2 flying predator that stalks watery ground and turns small mistakes into very real health loss. If you let it chain attacks, the fight swings out of control quickly.
behavior: It usually stays within a fairly small airspace, though it does land on leaves or dry ground to rest. On top of the harassment, it heals from part of the damage it deals, so giving it free hits makes the fight drag out badly.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks the player on sight and rarely gets tired of pressing. It will not follow you underwater, but as long as the fight stays on the surface it tries to keep you reacting on its tempo.
interactionWithCreatures: It is neutral with many creatures unless attacked, but wasps and wasp drones are especially hostile toward mosquitoes and often kill them on sight.
strategy: You really want at least Tier 2 gear and you do not want to fight swarms. The basic poke and the loop attack are manageable if you read the rhythm; the real problem starts when you let it connect repeatedly and stretch the fight out.
specialTraits: It lifesteals for 75% of the damage it deals.

abilities.name: Poke
abilities.description: It lines up its beak and thrusts straight forward in a blockable hit.

abilities.name: 3-Combo Poke
abilities.description: It sways side to side before chaining together three blockable pokes.

abilities.name: Loop Divebomb
abilities.description: It loops through the air before charging in with a strong blockable thrust.
